title: MikroTik SFP module S-31DLC20D, SM, 20km, 1.25G, 1310nm
description: S-31DLC20D is a 1.25G SFP transceiver with a 1310nm Dual LC connector, for up to 20 kilometer Single Mode fiber connections, with DDM Units are tested and compatible with RB260GS,RB2011LS, RB2011LS-IN, RB2011UAS-IN, RB2011UAS-RM, RB2011UAS-2HnD, RB2011UAS-2HnD-IN, and CCR1036-12G-4S. Units are compatible with non-MikroTik SFP devices as well
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 1.25 / 1.25 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 Distance [km] 20 Transfer type 2-fiber Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC General Compatibility Universal
